refnamediv.refpurpose: Display an image with detection boxes and labels.

refsynopsisdiv.title: Syntax
refsynopsisdiv.synopsis: imshow_detections(image, detections) imshow_detections(image, detections, labels, rgb, titleText)

listitem.para: Structure with boxes, scores, and classIds fields.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: imshow_detections displays an image with image-space detection boxes and class labels. Label placement converts the image top-left origin to Scilab graphics coordinates.

refsection.title: Examples
